channel.title: Posts on Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Hugo Site

item.title: Simple Keyboard: a keyboard that doesn't have to try
item.description: Simple Keyboard is a keyboard app for Android OS based on the AOSP Keyboard. It is available on both the F-Droid repository and the Google Play Store. And needed, its APK can be directly grabbed from the project’s Github releases page here. One of the reasons I moved to this keyboard had been that at the time I used to use Hacker’s Keyboard and wanted to try out something else.
